ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1602. First custodian of the Biblioteca Marciana, published an Index of mss, as well as the Latin version of Plato`s Dialogues, and Galen`s Commentaries.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
